Fetch-KVMs.name: Fetch-KVMs
Fetch-KVMs.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="Fetch-KVMs">
    <DisplayName>Fetch-KVMs</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://fetchAndProcessKvms.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>

Service-Callout-List-KVMs.name: Service-Callout-List-KVMs
Service-Callout-List-KVMs.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="Service-Callout-List-KVMs">
    <DisplayName>Service Callout-List-KVMs</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Request variable="kvmListRequest">
        <Set>
            <Verb>GET</Verb>
            <Path>/v1/organizations/advana/environments/dev/keyvaluemaps</Path>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>kvmListResponse</Response>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <Properties/>
        <URL>https://api.enterprise.apigee.com</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>
